plugins.Description: Passively records every housing lottery bid you place, per character, by reading the placard when you interact with it. One row per bid: character/world, region, district, ward, plot, size, FC-vs-personal, entry date, results-available date with live countdown, and outcome (Pending/Won/Lost). Auto-captures placard data during entry and results periods; auto-detects wins via the results SelectYesno; entry number is grabbed when shown and editable otherwise. Sortable table with click-to-expand details, per-column toggles, editable notes, and optional shared storage across all clients. Open with /hlt (alias /lotto).

plugins.Author: Akari
plugins.Name: Market Helper
plugins.Description:
Market Helper is an all-in-one market board tool with three tabs:

UNDERCUT — Stand near a summoning bell and press Run. It walks every retainer on the bell and undercuts each listed item to the lowest price. HQ/NQ handling, own-retainer protection, per-item overrides, and price memory within a run. Skips mannequin/display items (detected by the game's mannequin icon) so they're never touched or delisted.

LISTER — Build a list of items (hold CTRL and hover to quick-add, or search). Press Go and it walks the bell and lists them all, pricing each at the most common market price (ignoring lone troll/outlier listings) minus your undercut. Prices against your world, data center, or whole region. Handles the 20-item-per-retainer cap by rolling extra items to the next retainer. Includes a no-touch dry-run preview.

FLIPPER — Search any marketable item and compare prices across Japan, America, Europe and Materia via Universalis. Top 10 listings per region, best cross-region flip, and seller/buyer tax modeling.

Open with /markethelp, /market, /mh, or /undercut.

plugins.Author: doomzao
plugins.Name: True Ping
plugins.Description:
Measures your true FFXIV ping by timing the game's own keepalive round-trip (the latency the server actually answers), not the OS network latency. Because it reads the game protocol, it reports the real latency you feel even when you route through a proxy or VPN, where ordinary ping tools only see localhost. Shows current ping, average, min, max, jitter and packet loss, in a floating overlay and in the server info bar.

Commands:
/trueping : open the settings window
/trueping overlay : toggle the floating overlay
/trueping dtr : toggle the server info bar entry
/trueping reset : clear the statistics

plugins.Author: Kid Icarus
plugins.Name: Character Select+
plugins.Description:
Character Select+ allows you to create, save, and instantly apply fully customized character profiles with the press of a button. Switch between your OCs effortlessly using /select CharacterName, applying Penumbra Collections, Glamourer Designs, Customize+ Profiles, and Honorific Titles in one command.

While profile switching is its core purpose, Character Select+ includes additional features:
✔ Advanced Mode – Create custom macro setups for deeper character customization.
✔ Profile-Specific Designs – Use multiple outfits, styles, and looks per character.
✔ Favorites & Sorting – Keep profiles organized by name, date, or importance.
✔ Quick Swap Bar! 
✔ One-Click Macro Execution – Run predefined commands instantly when selecting a character.

Whether you're roleplaying, gposing, or just love quick customization, Character Select+ makes switching between characters faster, easier, and seamless.

Key Features: Custom chat commands, automatic priority management, smart emote detection, idle/sit/doze pose support, preset folders, icon picker, drag & drop organization, and warp-to-target for group emotes. Perfect for anyone who uses multiple animation mods.

plugins.Author: John Wilson (jdw-ss)
plugins.Name: Bulk Desynth
plugins.Description:
Queue and run bulk desynthesis jobs without clicking each item by hand. Target by item ID, bag, item-level / equipment-slot filters, or armoury chest category. Every job is dry-run first: the plugin builds a preview list of slots it intends to desynth, you click Confirm, then it walks the list one item at a time on the framework tick.

Usage:
  /bds         - open the main window
  /bds bag <n> - preview bag N (1-4)
  /bds item <itemId> - preview every copy of an item in inventory
  /bds stop    - cancel a running queue

plugins.Author: jkleinne

plugins.Author: jkleinne
plugins.Name: Ascended Rotation Solver Reborn
plugins.Description:
Personal fork of RotationSolverReborn that adds PvPSmart, a scoring-based PvP target selector. PvE behavior matches upstream.

The stock PvP cycle ranks targets by absolute current HP, which biases toward tanks over genuinely vulnerable squishies. PvPSmart composes weighted factors (role value, effective HP, finish-kill bias, mitigation penalty, distance, hysteresis, crystal carrier, LB cast, isolation, threat) and skips invuln targets entirely, producing more focus-fire-friendly target selection in Crystalline Conflict.

Use only if you specifically want the PvPSmart targeting mode. For general use, install upstream RotationSolverReborn instead.

plugins.Author: nxships
plugins.Name: PlayerNexusTracker
plugins.Description:
Track players you meet in FFXIV — who they are, when you ran into them, how their characters change over time. A focused social tracker built on the NexusKit framework.

Per-player detail view with Summary, Equipment, Class/Jobs, Achievements, Free Company, Encounters, History and Notes tabs. Optional enrichment from Lodestone (gear, FC link, achievement progress) and FFXIVCollect (mounts, minions, full achievement catalog). Live throttled refresh queue keeps external data fresh without hammering either service.

Configurable chat and toast notifications when players you've seen before change — rename, server transfer, Free Company join/leave/switch, achievement growth, refresh failures. Per-event filtering and history grouping so the chat doesn't drown you.

Powerful player-filter language with live preview to slice your list however you want; encounter history scoped per duty and content type; optional bridges to other Dalamud plugins (Lifestream world-travel, more to come).

Local-first: all data lives in a single SQLite file under your XIVLauncher config. Automated weekly maintenance keeps it tidy. English and German localization.

Please report issues/bugs and post suggestions on the Github website by clicking the globe icon.

plugins.Author: Aida Enna
plugins.Name: Macro Chain Redux
plugins.Description:
Allows for a macro to continue onto the next macro by using '/nextmacro' on the last line of a macro.
Adding '/nextmacro' on the last line of Macro #01 will automatically execute Macro #02
Adding '/nextmacro down' on the last line of Macro #01 will automatically execute Macro #11
Also allows executing any macro from chat using '/runmacro'
You can repeat a macro by using /runmacro inside the macro followed by the number of the macro you're editing
Using '/macrocancel' will stop the currently running macro

- Rarely, a glitched desynth window will pop up when saving the gearset instead of it saving the portait. This is being investigated, closing the window and swapping classes seems to fix it.

Please report issues/bugs and post suggestions on the Github website by clicking the globe icon.

plugins.Author: Sansflaire

The server only ever sees the player stop moving naturally.

plugins.Author: Sansflaire

plugins.Author: The Redheaded Witch, WillWolf76
plugins.Name: Fashion Report Calculator / Dye Finder
plugins.Description:
This is the new and improved Fashion Report System. This plugin will allow you to open a window that will show you what your fashion report status is vs the current week's theme.

There are a few parts to this. Since the only way to get Fashion Report for the week to my knowledge is speaking to Masked Rose after Tuesdays reset, this plugin takes the first person who does talk to him and updates everyone else. So only one person per week needs to speak to Masked Rose.

You can click on a theme and pull all the known items for that theme for that specific slot. You also get a very detailed breakdown of how much points you are getting based on what you are currently wearing.

The plugin also stores the attempts of those using the mod (just the data from fashioncheck, no user information) so that we can figure out the dyes faster and share information faster. The information in this table is wiped every week since once we discover the dyes, it is useless.

I still have more upgrades to do, including adding a dye window and the window that will help calculate the weekly dyes. I already have an idea of how I want to write them, so it shouldn't take me too long. If you have suggestions on how I can upgrade this, please share with me on github!

Credit for the program goes to it's original creator, WillWolf76, who wrote this for me originally.

When this plugin updates the database, it also updates my Discord Bot which you can set up to post fashion report each week. It's set to update on Tuesdays and Fridays (week start and dye information added). Link to add the Discord Bot is in the about section.

plugins.Author: Valenth Siveria
plugins.Name: I Am Ready
plugins.Description:
# I Am Ready

**I Am Ready** is a Dalamud plugin for Final Fantasy XIV that automatically accepts or declines Party and Alliance Ready Checks based on a customizable counter. 

Whether you are stepping away for a moment or just tired of clicking, this plugin handles ready checks for you while mimicking human reaction times.

## ✨ Features

* **Auto-Answer Ready Checks:** Automatically clicks "Yes" or "No" when a ready check appears.
* **Configurable "Yes" Counter:** Set a specific number of times you want to automatically answer "Yes". Once that limit is reached, the plugin will automatically start answering "No" to prevent pulling when you are actually away.
* **Natural Delay:** Enable a randomized delay (0.7 to 2.5 seconds) before the plugin answers, making it look like a natural human reaction.
* **Smart Chat Triggers (Regex):** Add custom text phrases to the plugin. If someone says one of these phrases in Party or Alliance chat (e.g., "reset", "pulling"), your counter will automatically reset back to zero.
* **Bilingual Support:** The user interface is available in both English and German.

## 🚀 Usage

1. Type `/iar` in the in-game chat to open the configuration window.
2. Click the **Inactive/Active** button at the top to turn the auto-responder on or off.
3. Adjust the **Yes Count** slider. For example, if set to `5`, the plugin will answer "Yes" to the next 5 ready checks, and "No" to any checks after that.
4. Click the **Start** button at any time to manually reset your current counter back to zero.

### Chat Triggers (Regex Patterns)
At the bottom of the window, you can expand the **Regex Patterns** section. Here you can add simple words or complex regex patterns. 
If the plugin reads a matching message in your Party or Cross-World Party chat, it will instantly reset your counter to zero, assuming a new pull or instance is starting!

/iar - opens the I Am Ready tool

• Case-insensitive by default

• Live preview so you can test rules before using them

plugins.Author: yagi2

Active 'refresh all retainers' walks the bell automatically to repopulate snapshots. Snapshots are also collected passively whenever you summon a retainer and open the sell list. Character bag and saddlebag are displayed as separate sections (entrust-then-list flow planned). Six-language UI (EN/JA/DE/FR/ZH/KO). Warns once at startup if AutoRetainer is also loaded since both drive retainer summoning.
